hero.title: Manage Projects. Empower Teams. Deliver Results.
hero.subtitle: Asoode brings together project management, team collaboration, and real-time communication in one powerful platform. From Kanban boards to Gantt charts, from team messaging to time tracking — everything your team needs to succeed.

features_overview.title: Everything you need to manage work
features_overview.subtitle: Powerful tools that work together seamlessly
features_overview.project_management_desc: Organize work with projects, sub-projects, and seasons. Track progress with road maps and tree views. Manage team access at every level.
features_overview.kanban_desc: Visualize workflow with drag-and-drop Kanban boards. Create custom lists, move tasks between stages, and track progress at a glance.
features_overview.collaboration_desc: Build your organization structure with groups, departments, and teams. Manage members, permissions, and access levels with precision.
features_overview.messenger_desc: Communicate instantly with built-in messaging. Direct messages, project channels, and file sharing — all without leaving your workspace.
features_overview.time_tracking_desc: Track time spent on tasks, generate reports, and manage team schedules. Built-in attendance tracking and time-off management for HR.
features_overview.files_desc: Upload, organize, and share files with your team. Attach documents to tasks, preview files inline, and manage storage efficiently.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Get started in three simple steps
how_it_works.step1_desc: Set up your organization, invite team members, and define your group structure. Asoode adapts to your organization's hierarchy — from holdings to individual teams.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Create projects, define work packages, and build your Kanban boards. Choose from templates or start from scratch. Set milestones, assign team members, and define objectives.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Move tasks through your workflow, track time, collaborate in real-time, and monitor progress with dashboards and reports. Everything stays connected and up-to-date.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.t1_text: Asoode transformed how our engineering team works. The Kanban boards are intuitive, and having messaging built right in means we no longer switch between five different tools.
testimonials.t2_text: We manage 200+ employees across three offices with Asoode. The HR features, time tracking, and org chart make it our single source of truth for team management.
testimonials.t3_text: The multi-language support was a game-changer for our international team. Persian calendar support and RTL layout mean our Iranian office finally has a tool that feels native.

integrations.title: Works with your existing tools
integrations.subtitle: Open API — integrate Asoode with your existing workflow through our comprehensive REST API.

cta.title: Ready to transform your team's productivity?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of teams using Asoode to manage projects, track progress, and collaborate in real-time.
cta.note: No credit card required. Free plan includes up to 10 members.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Everything you need to get started with Asoode, understand its features, and integrate with our API.
docs.s1_desc: Set up your account, create your first project, and invite your team.
docs.s2_desc: Understand the system architecture and technology stack.
docs.s3_desc: Explore the REST API endpoints and response formats.
docs.s4_desc: Detailed guides for every feature in Asoode.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team. All plans include core features. Upgrade as you grow.
pricing.pro_desc: Growing teams that need more power
pricing.free_limits: Up to 5 members · 3 projects · 500 MB storage
pricing.faq1_q: Can I switch plans at any time?
pricing.faq1_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and billing is prorated.
pricing.faq2_q: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
pricing.faq2_a: Yes, all paid plans include a 14-day free trial with full features. No credit card required.
pricing.faq3_q: What happens when I exceed my storage limit?
pricing.faq3_a: You'll receive a notification when approaching your limit. You can upgrade your plan or purchase additional storage.
pricing.faq4_q: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or education?
pricing.faq4_a: Yes, we offer 50% off for qualified nonprofits and educational institutions. Contact our sales team.
pricing.faq5_a: Yes, all plans allow you to export your data at any time. Enterprise plans include automated backup options.

feat.title: Features
feat.hero_sub: Asoode combines powerful project management, team collaboration, and communication tools into a unified platform.
feat.f1_desc: Organize your work with a flexible project structure. Create projects, break them down into sub-projects and seasons, and track progress at every level.
feat.f1_p3: Road map and tree view for planning
feat.f2_desc: Turn your project plans into action with Kanban boards. Create work packages, define lists, and move tasks through your workflow with intuitive drag-and-drop.
feat.f2_p2: Board, List, Calendar, and Timeline views
feat.f3_desc: Every task is a rich, collaborative workspace. Add details, assign members, track time, attach files, and communicate — all in one place.
feat.f4_desc: Model your organization structure in Asoode. From the top-level holding company down to individual teams, manage your entire hierarchy.
feat.f4_p4: Invite members by email or phone
feat.f5_desc: Stop switching between tools. Asoode's built-in messenger lets your team communicate in real-time, right where the work happens.
feat.f6_desc: Beyond project management, Asoode helps you manage your team. Track attendance, manage shifts, handle time-off requests, and generate reports.
feat.f7_desc: Keep all your project files organized and accessible. Upload, share, and manage files with a familiar folder-based interface.
feat.f8_desc: Stay informed with real-time dashboards and reports. Track progress, monitor deadlines, and identify bottlenecks before they become problems.
feat.f8_p1: Stats: Total, Done, Blocked, In Progress
feat.f9_desc: Asoode is built for international teams. Full support for multiple languages and calendar systems means everyone gets a native experience.

about.title: About Asoode
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to give every team the tools they need to do their best work — all in one place, with no compromises.
about.mission_text: We believe that great work happens when teams have the right tools. Asoode was born from the frustration of juggling multiple tools for project management, communication, and team coordination. We built a single platform that brings everything together — so your team can focus on what matters: getting things done.
about.story_heading: From internal tool to global platform
about.story_text: Asoode started as an internal tool at a software company that was tired of switching between Trello for tasks, Slack for messaging, and spreadsheets for time tracking. We realized that if we needed this, thousands of other teams did too. So we built Asoode — a comprehensive platform that combines the best of project management, team collaboration, and HR tools.
about.ms1: Born as an internal tool to solve our own collaboration pain points.
about.ms2: Launched publicly after hundreds of teams requested access.
about.ms3: Expanded with messenger, time tracking, and HR features.
about.ms4: Serving thousands of teams across 40+ countries worldwide.
about.different_subtitle: Five principles that guide everything we build
about.diff1_desc: No more tool sprawl. Project management, messaging, time tracking, and HR — all in one place.
about.diff2_desc: Multi-language, multi-calendar, and RTL support. Your team works in the language they think in.
about.diff3_desc: Model any organization hierarchy — from solo freelancers to enterprise holdings with complex structures.
about.diff4_desc: Your data stays yours. We don't sell data, don't mine behavior, and take security seriously.
about.diff5_desc: Open API with clean documentation. Integrate Asoode into your existing workflow with ease.
about.val1_desc: Powerful doesn't mean complicated. Every feature should be intuitive and easy to use.
about.val2_desc: Built for teams worldwide. Language and culture should never be a barrier to great work.
about.val3_desc: Open pricing, clear documentation, honest communication. No hidden fees or surprises.
about.val4_desc: Your work depends on us. We take that responsibility seriously with 99.9% uptime.
about.team_subtitle: The people behind Asoode — passionate about building tools that make work better.
about.m1_bio: 10+ years in software engineering. Obsessed with building products that simplify complex workflows.
about.m2_bio: Full-stack architect who believes in clean code and scalable systems. Loves open source.
about.m3_bio: Former product lead at a SaaS startup. Bridges the gap between user needs and technical solutions.
about.m4_bio: Crafts intuitive interfaces that feel delightful. Passionate about accessibility and design systems.
about.m5_bio: Performance enthusiast. Builds the infrastructure that keeps Asoode fast and reliable at scale.
about.m6_bio: Connects teams with the right tools. Focused on community building and customer success.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question about Asoode? Want to explore how we can help your team collaborate better? We're here and ready to help.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us what you need help with...
contact.form_desc: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.ch_email_desc: For general inquiries and detailed questions. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.ch_chat_desc: Chat with our support team in real-time during business hours.
contact.ch_demo_desc: Book a 30-minute call with our team to see Asoode in action.
contact.faq1_a: Yes! Our free plan supports up to 10 team members with core features included. No credit card required.
contact.faq2_a: We typically respond within 4 hours on business days, and within 24 hours on weekends.
contact.faq3_q: Can I migrate from other tools?
contact.faq3_a: Absolutely. We offer free migration assistance from Trello, Jira, Asana, and other platforms.
contact.location_extra: We're a remote-first company with team members across multiple time zones.

footer.tagline: Project management and team collaboration — all in one place.
footer.newsletter_desc: Get product updates, tips, and news delivered to your inbox.
